title: deer-flow.kb.entry.authored v1
description: Emitted by deer-flow's ResearchDispatchConsumer (packages/harness/deerflow/research_dispatch/consumer.py) after the kb-structurer agent writes a structured markdown summary of a completed research cycle to the knowledge vault (~/knowledge/indexed/<project_source>/<research_id>_structured.md).

research_id.description: Identifier for the research request (CloudEvents subject).

kb_path.description: Absolute filesystem path to the written vault markdown file.

project_source.description: Originating project/source the research cycle was requested for.
